text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm meandering about the academy<n>on my day
off, until<n>Matikanefukukitaru comes charging<n>right
at me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I finally found you, Trainer! Oh, I'm so<n>glad to see
you're all right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to talk! I have to get<n>you
somewhere safe right away!<n>Quick, follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unable to grasp the pandemonium at<n>hand, I find
myself being dragged to<n>the nearest train station...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Great, the train's about to<n>arrive! Don't
you worry, we're<n>almost there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, sorry! I completely forgot to<n>give you an
explanation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Try to stay calm, okay? It's about<n>your horoscope.
Today, you have...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Super-ultra-mega misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But don't you fret! I came running to<n>give you this
high-powered good-luck<n>charm—strong against the
most<n>dastardly of calamities!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I will protect you with my lucky<n>powers, even from
the great<n>misfortune that lingers over you as<n>we
speak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So please don't leave my side! If you<n>do, lightning
might strike from above,<n>or the ground might split
open and<n>swallow you whole!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's dead serious. She sticks close<n>to me like a
bodyguard, even while<n>we're on the move.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I was just getting to that.<n>You see, this
town has a shrine that is<n>renowned all throughout
the country!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's also one of Japan's preeminent<n>sacred sites!
I'm sure a place like<n>this will wipe you clean of
bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We should go pray! Oh, or we could<n>set you up
with another good-luck<n>charm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! The best thing to do here is to<n>ask the gods
for help!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Operation Bad Luck Break is<n>underway! Ahem...
Rovah, rivah, vah<n>vuu vee... Let us reach our goal
safely...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, we've come to the shrine<n>on a holiday.
There are many more<n>visitors than expected, and I
lose<n>sight of Matikanefukukitaru before I<n>realize
it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whew! What a crowd today! But<n>don't worry,
we're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? T-Trainer? Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm more likely to walk right by her<n>than anything
else if I go looking, so I<n>stay where I am until
Matikanefukukitaru calls me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Trainer?! I'm so sorry!<n>I promised
to protect you and look<n>what happened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not giving up! I'll definitely<n>find you, so
just sit tight!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard Matikanefukukitaru<n>sound so
determined before... It's<n>unlike her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No misfortune will bring harm to my<n>trainer—not on
my watch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide not to mention that I can see<n>her about
thirty meters away yelling<n>into her phone.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Hello?! Are you there?! Say<n>something!
Speak to me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm coming to get you right<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as she asked me to, I sit tight<n>until finds me...
about fifteen minutes<n>later.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thank goodness! Oh, praise<n>be!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I share a<n>touching (?)
moment, reunited at last.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I was really getting worried for<n>a minute
there, but it looks like we got<n>our prayers in just
fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With this, you're now safe and<n>sound! After all, I
prayed super hard<n>for you to be protected for all
eternity!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think asking for such a huge<n>favor in one
go is a bit too much?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I better add in an extra offering, to be<n>safe... Let
me go buy a good-luck<n>charm real quick!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we leave lugging bags<n>chock full of
good-luck charms.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's good to have luck as your shield!<n>Let's get
moving!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it ain't Fukukitaru! Fancy<n>meetin' you
here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhhhh! Taiki and Suzuka! What<n>are you two
doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We're here sightseeing... We were<n>just about to
look for some<n>souvenirs.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and your trainer's here too!<n>Lemme pop on
over for some proper<n>greetin's!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-wait just a second! Don't come<n>anywhere
near my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh, but why?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just don't! I've got to be the one by<n>my trainer's
side!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, that shouldn't be a problem!<n>Now that we're
all here, I reckon we<n>can just go as a group!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That won't do! Today is... It's just... I<n>have to be
with my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And it has to be just the two of us,<n>okay?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't quite get it, but maybe<n>it's best not to
get in her way, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It might be that they have some<n>important matters
to discuss. I think<n>we'd better leave them alone, at
any<n>rate.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Important matters? Alone...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I'm pickin' up what you're<n>puttin' down!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry 'bout that! We didn't mean to<n>interrupt
anything! Go and have<n>yourselves a lovely day,
ya hear? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling there's a bit of a
misunderstanding at hand, but<n>Matikanefukukitaru
breathes a sigh<n>of relief as they walk away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That was close! Any closer and you<n>would've
infected them with your<n>bad luck, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If that happened, you would've<n>become known as
the unlucky trainer<n>of death—exiled from the racing
world...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry and buy ourselves a<n>lucky charm
before anything else<n>happens!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll pick the best of the bunch! Don't<n>worry,
you're in good hands!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's words sound<n>reassuring
enough, but when we<n>arrive at the counter...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! There are so many ultra-rare<n>charms
here! Just look at 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We end up buying up every last one<n>we can get
our hands on.
